meta.description: Sound asset specifications for desktop-cat. Actual WAV/MP3 files to be generated programmatically.
meta.generated_by: Coder via PyQt6 QAudioGenerator or scipy/numpy

sounds.name: purr
sounds.spec: 55Hz sine wave, triangle envelope (soft attack/decay), 200ms fade-in, continuous loop
sounds.notes: Low rumbling — layer 55Hz + 110Hz sub-harmonic at -6dB for warmth

sounds.name: meow_short
sounds.spec: Rising pitch from 350Hz to 800Hz over 0.3s, then quick 100ms decay. Glottal stop at start. 'mrr?' quality
sounds.notes: Questioning meow — frequency sweep up with slight vibrato (10Hz, 2%)

sounds.name: meow_long
sounds.spec: Descending tone 800Hz → 300Hz over 0.6s, 5Hz vibrato (slight waver), 200ms natural decay tail
sounds.notes: Classic meow — add formant shift for fullness: F1~800Hz, F2~1800Hz

sounds.name: footstep
sounds.spec: 80Hz thud, 50ms exponential decay, bandpass filtered (100-200Hz). Very short — single pad tap
sounds.notes: Tiny impact sound — layer white noise burst (2ms) for texture

sounds.name: sleep_breathing
sounds.spec: Gentle white noise swell, triangle amplitude envelope (slow attack 400ms, slow decay 400ms, 200ms pause). Soft sibilance at 3-6kHz
sounds.notes: Rhythmic breathing — bandpass white noise 300Hz-4kHz, gentle fade loop

sounds.name: eat_crunch
sounds.spec: Short burst of high-frequency noise (4-8kHz), 20ms attack, 60ms decay. Random tiny clicks layered
sounds.notes: Tiny kibble crunch — white noise burst with 3 random amplitude peaks
